sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16568" key="a)sto/xhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστόχ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n16568.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">failure, fault,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.520b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
